query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A nighttime photograph of a snowy street with several parked cars covered in snow. A prominent street lamp shines in the upper right corner, with additional lights visible at intervals into the distance. A snow-covered vehicle sits in the lower right, while other cars appear along the left edge. Heavy snow and fog obscure the background, where faint shapes of trees or bushes are barely discernible against the dark sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A muted, desaturated nighttime photograph of a snowy street with snow-covered parked cars beneath glowing street lamps. The image exhibits flat, shadowless lighting and an oppressive low-contrast atmosphere of washed-out gray tones that crush midtones into near uniformity. Dense fog and falling snow further flatten the scene into melancholic stillness, evoking a mood of isolation and atmospheric dread as background elements dissolve into indistinct haze.
